query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A frog sits amid green foliage at the center of an abstract image, with architectural elements visible near the bottom edge showing illuminated vertical surfaces against a dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A small green frog and surrounding leaves appear smeared into radial motion blur streaks emanating from the center, creating a vortex effect that renders the subject unrecognizable as clear detail; the composition is rotated or tilted with the sky occupying most of the frame and warm-lit structures appearing only at the lower edge; the dark upper atmosphere and blown-out light sources produce extreme exposure contrasts across the frame.
